   - Dev remains enterprise-focused but moderate at $20.2k/day total.
 - Watch next week: D_E02 response, any new enterprise leads, cash recovery after spend cuts, S2 churn, and S2 issue age.
+
+## Week 22 / Day 147
+
+- Cash: $2,124,590. Subscribers: 138,342. Week 21 added 2,343 subscribers from 6,256 leads; cancellations improved to 1,184. Open issues fell to 11,504.
+- Enterprise pivot generated 13 new leads totaling 5,545 seats. All but one are D_E02; one is D_E09.
+- Previous D_E02 lead 320945 is still open after our A $69 / B $89 / C $129 offer.
+- Sent offers to 12 new D_E02 leads: A $69, B $89, C $129 per seat. Sent offer to D_E09 lead 327220: A $89, B $109, C $149.
+- D_E02 economics: WTP ~$69.58/seat, A quality 0.817 clears floor 0.65, usage ~93.2. A $69 should close while retaining margin on A tier 3.
+- Week 21 cash flow: subscription payments $3,352,420; compute -$976,177; ops -$868,000; ads -$385,000; capacity -$196,000; dev -$141,400; lead acquisition -$3,816.
+- Changes:
+  - Continued no new R&D.
+  - Refreshed research for D_E02, D_E09, D_E08 to level 2, expected day 150.
+  - Concentrated ads: S2 content $10k/day; LinkedIn D_E02 $30k/day, D_E08 $10k/day, D_E09 $10k/day. Stopped E3 ads because its updated quality floor is too high for current C quality.
+  - Kept tiers A3/B3/C5 and prices $109/$279/$499.
+  - Ops $119k/day total: global $25k, S2 $80k, S3 $1k, D_E02 $7k, D_E08 $3k, D_E09 $3k.
+  - Dev $16.7k/day total, focused on D_E02/D_E08/D_E09 and light S2 maintenance.
+  - Capacity remains tier 6.
+- Watch next week: D_E02/D_E09 acceptances or counters, enterprise cash timing, new enterprise lead volume under concentrated LinkedIn spend, and individual churn.
